## No water left behind.
The Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared to the original version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant boasts a higher GSM boost and an absorbency that is up to 50% greater. The edges have been reduced to an absolute minimum, making the towel even more functional and safer to use on complex-shaped panels.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-silkdryer-evo-large1.webp?v=1734043988&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-silkdryer-evo-2.webp?v=1734043988&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-silk-dryer-evo-banner.webp?v=1734044103&width=2400)

Twisted Loop for better absorption
Twisted loop technology enhances the surface area and absorbency of microfiber towels, making them ideal for drying cars and other surfaces.
Faster Drying: The longer pile and increased fiber surface contact of twisted loop towels enable quicker drying.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-syncro-evo_44f0fca8-8e62-431f-af99-fe8ed1b58eef.jpg?v=1701990854&width=1080)

When everything is prepped, clean, and new, this is the best time to preserve all its glory with a ceramic coating.

Zero scratch
Safe on All Surfaces: These towels are safe to use on all paint types, wraps, and paint protection films.
Soft Touch: The gentle texture of twisted loop towels helps keep a car's paint scratch-free and swirl-free.
Explore GYEON's new full line up of EVO towels, that has you covered inside and out.

Description

## Gyeon Silk Dryer IMPROVED & MORE ABSORBENT THAN EVER! TWIST-LOOP, SYNTHETIC FIBRES FOR IMPRESSIVE DRYING AND A STREAK-FREE FINISH.

Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared with the version introduced back in 2015, the EVO variant features a higher GSM at 530. The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than before. Reduced edges to an absolute minimum, to make the towel even more functional and safer on complex-shaped panels.

Are these machine washable?

Yes, GYEON Silk Dryer EVO and other EVO towels are durable, machine washable, and safe for tumble drying.

Does it feel "crunchy" and seem less absorbent?

Hard water and mineral deposits can eventually affect the performance of the towel. Preventive measures, such as soaking it in a vinegar solution to break down hardened deposits, can help. However, it's best to replace the towel once it becomes overly stiff. Saving a crusty towel isn’t worth the risk of scratching your paint.
